steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes a 'huge diversity' of languages across the Americas, indicating that the blank should describe a similarly large variety.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The word needs to mean vast or enormous in scale, mirroring "huge diversity." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — immense: extremely large — directly echoes "huge diversity" and fits the comparison to the continents themselves. ✓
  • Choice B — unknown: not yet discovered or understood — the passage is not saying the variety is a mystery, only that it is large. ✗
  • Choice C — ordinary: not special or noteworthy — contradicts the emphasis on "huge diversity." ✗
  • Choice D — limited: small in extent — the opposite of what the passage conveys. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
